title: Sex Might Be the Longevity Drug Nobody Prescribes
description: A 10-year study of nearly 1,000 men found that those who orgasmed twice a week had half the mortality risk of those who rarely did. The finding has been replicated. The mechanism is plausible. And the field still can't answer the most important question: does sex make you live longer, or do healthy people just have more sex? This piece follows the evidence honestly — and finds it more interesting than either answer.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Sex Might Be the Longevity Drug Nobody Prescribes
